meaning: n.[数]变数,可变物,变量adj.可变的,不定的,易变的,[数]变量的
examples: The drill has variable speed control.
The potassium content of foodstuffs is very variable.
The temperature remained constant while pressure was a variable in the experiment.
These variable annuities include a guaranteed death benefit that pays on the death of the insured.
How well a person recovers from stroke is highly variable and highly individual, Antoniello said.
